title: Unity's Quarterly Revenues See 17% Growth to $508.2M
text: Q1 2026 Financial Results: Total Revenue: $508.2 million, representing 17% year-over-year growth. This exceeded the company's guidance range of $480-490 million. Strategic Revenue: $432.4 million, up 35% YoY, driven primarily by Vector platform momentum. Adjusted EBITDA: $138 million with a 27% margin, up 800 basis points year-over-year. Segment Breakdown: Grow Solutions revenue jumped 49% YoY to $279 million, with Vector accounting for 80% of this growth. Create Solutions revenue rose 15% YoY to $154 million, fueled by subscription increases. Business Metrics: New Unity sign-ups grew 20% quarter-over-quarter, the fastest pace since 2020. Mobile app releases increased 60% YoY across iOS and Android platforms. Vector Performance: The AI-powered ad platform showed strong adoption with four consecutive quarters of 15% sequential growth. Results suggest Vector is becoming a significant growth driver alongside the core game engine business.
